case_title: DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. TONY THEPESE MCGUIRE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, TONY THEPESE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $69.00. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC SERVED SEP-14-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, TONY THEPESE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, TONY THEPESE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE COMPLAINT AS AGAINST ALL DOE DEFENDANTS.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DHYAN INVESTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, TONY THEPESE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 790 ELLIS STREET, #227 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
